description: A university recruiting team is managing a career fair, including registering candidates and tracking applications.

nodes.task_description: Set up a landing page for students to pre-register for the event.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter creates an event registration page.

nodes.task_description: At the event, use a tablet to have students sign in and upload their resumes directly into the ATS.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiters at the event successfully capture candidate information.

nodes.task_description: After the event, review all collected resumes and tag them with the 'Career Fair' source code.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiting team processes all leads from the event, ensuring they are correctly tracked.
